description: ZESCO carries approximately USD 500 million (ZMW 13.1 billion) in sovereign-guaranteed debt. Inability to service this debt creates contingent liability for the Government of Zambia.
mitigationPlan: Implement cost-reflective tariff increases; restructure debt with creditors; improve revenue collection from large customers.

description: Low water levels at Kariba Dam reduce hydropower generation capacity, leading to load shedding and revenue loss.
mitigationPlan: Accelerate Kafue Gorge Lower commissioning; procure emergency thermal power; implement demand-side management.

riskTitle: Tax Evasion and Illicit Financial Flows
description: Transfer pricing abuse by multinational mining companies and illicit financial flows reduce tax revenue collection.
mitigationPlan: Strengthen transfer pricing audit capacity; implement OECD BEPS measures; enhance customs border controls.

description: NAPSA's investment portfolio is heavily concentrated in government securities and real estate, creating liquidity and market risk.
mitigationPlan: Diversify into equities and regional bonds; develop investment policy statement with diversification limits.

description: Risk of procurement fraud and inflated contract prices in road construction projects due to weak oversight.
mitigationPlan: Implement e-procurement system; strengthen internal audit function; publish all contracts above ZMW 5 million.

description: Significant depreciation of the Zambian Kwacha increases external debt servicing costs and inflationary pressures.
mitigationPlan: Maintain adequate foreign exchange reserves; implement monetary policy tightening as needed; coordinate with Ministry of Finance on fiscal consolidation.
